input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>The game clock decreases from 10:24 to 10:23 in the first period. A red lower-third graphic appears displaying "GOALS: LUCAS RAYMOND (21 & 22)". Players in black and white jerseys shift positions on the ice; a player in black skates near the goal crease on the left, while another in white moves along the bottom right boards. The score remains 2-0.</think><answer></answer>

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [6-8] A referee in a black and white striped shirt raises both arms to signal a goal, pointing toward center ice as spectators in the foreground raise their arms and a player in a white jersey skates away from the net while the goaltender remains on the ice. [8-10] The camera zooms in on the back of a player wearing a white jersey with black shoulders displaying the name 'ZEGRAS' and number '46', while an orange graphic labeled 'GOAL' appears on the left side of the bottom scoreboard overlay. [10-12] The camera tracks player number '46' to reveal his face as he skates, then cuts to a bald man in a dark suit and blue tie sitting behind the glass with spectators in red jerseys visible behind him. [12-14] The bald man shifts his gaze upward as the scoreboard overlay displays '1ST 10:18' and the score for the team on the left updates from '2' to '3'. [14-16] The view cuts from the coach to a smiling player on the bench wearing a white helmet and white jersey with black shoulders. The lower scoreboard ticker changes to a blue bar displaying: "GOALS: PAVEL BUCHNEVICH (22) | ROBERT THOMAS (14)". [16-18]

[22-24] A goaltender in a green jersey with "VEJMELEK" on the back and a colorful helmet stands before "MOUNTAIN AMERICA" boards, raising a black glove with orange trim toward his mask. [24-26] The view switches to a player in a white jersey with black shoulders and "ZEGRAS" on the back, wearing a white "UCI Health" helmet and raising a black glove, as the bottom ticker updates to "GOALS: ZACH HYMAN (23 & 24) | EVANDER KANE (16)". [26-28] A wide high-angle shot reveals the ice rink with a goal net in the foreground; a player in a dark jersey #70 stands near the crease while a teammate in dark jersey #42 skates left. [28-30] The camera zooms in as player #70 drops to the ice, while a player in a white jersey skates in from the left with the puck and another battles for position near the crease against a defender.

[30-32] Player dark jersey #86 skates toward the goal from the left while the goaltender (dark) guards the crease, and a white jersey player appears on the right near the boards as play concentrates at the net mouth. [32-34] Player white jersey #46 skates away from the net raising his stick while the goaltender lies on the ice inside the crease, a referee in a striped shirt stands nearby on the right, and other players in dark jerseys watch. [34-36] The camera cuts to a close-up behind the net where the goaltender in a dark jersey #70 lies on the ice, player dark jersey #86 stands near the goal frame, teammates in dark jerseys #61 and #72 skate nearby, and advertising for "GILA RIVER" appears on the boards. [36-38] The angle shifts to show the front of the net where player white jersey #2 skates toward the crease, the goaltender in a dark jersey #70 remains on the ice inside the net, player dark jersey #86 stands behind the goal near the frame, and advertising for "MOUNTAIN AMERICA" and "ally SPORTS" appears on the boards.

[0-6] The game clock decreases from 10:24 to 10:19 in the first period with the score at 2-0. A red lower-third graphic displays "GOALS: LUCAS RAYMOND (21 & 22)". Players in black and white jerseys converge near the left goal crease where the goalie drops to the ice to defend against a scramble. A referee in stripes observes from the left boards while player #73 in black skates toward the right.
[38-42] Later, player Silfverberg in white jersey #18 skates from the left toward the goal, stick extended, approaching the crease where teammate McLeod (#12) stands. The goaltender in dark pads drops into a butterfly position to block. A defender in a dark jersey guards the post while defender #73 (Jenik) watches from the right side near boards displaying "Bally SPORTS" and "MOUNTAIN AMERICA CREDIT UNION" ads.

[44-50] A player in a white jersey number 18 skates closer to the goal crease from the left, extending his stick low along the ice towards the net. The goaltender in dark gear remains in a butterfly position blocking the lower net. A teammate in white number 12 stands directly in front of the net, while defenders in dark jerseys observe near the goal frame and right. [50-52] Teammate number 12 battles for position against a defender in a dark jersey while screening the net. The goaltender maintains a butterfly stance as another defender watches from the right side near the boards advertising Mountain America. [52-54] The camera shifts to an overhead view showing the goaltender in dark pads down in the crease. A player in a white jersey is near the goal line while a defender in a dark jersey number 86 stands above the crease. Another defender in dark gear is positioned to the right.

recent_thinks: [42-44] A player in a white jersey number 18 extends his stick near the goal crease, appearing to pass or shoot the puck while a teammate in white number 12 stands directly in front of the net. The goaltender in dark gear remains in a butterfly position blocking the lower net, flanked by defenders in dark jerseys observing the play near the goal frame.

[54-56] Overhead view persists with the goaltender in dark pads lying prone in the blue crease. A player in a white jersey is positioned near the goal line at the bottom left. A defender in a dark jersey stands above the crease. A partial view of another player's skate is visible at the bottom right.

[56-58] The view transitions from a high-angle overhead shot to a close-up of the goaltender's face, showing his helmet with a cage and green jersey. A graphic overlay at the bottom displays the score 3-0 and time 10:18 in the first period.

[58-60] A close-up shot persists on the goaltender wearing a green jersey and a colorful helmet with a black cage. His gaze shifts slightly while facing forward against the white ice background. The scoreboard overlay at the bottom remains static, displaying a 3-0 score and 10:18 remaining in the first period alongside game advertisements.

[60-62] The close-up of the goaltender in the green jersey and colorful helmet cuts to a grey end screen displaying the 'SN UNITED BY SPORT' logo in black text with a red and blue underline. Below, the words 'MORE CLIPS' and 'SUBSCRIBE' appear in black capital letters against the grey background.

queries.question: Where is the goalie in the maroon jersey lying on the ice after the goal is scored? A. On the right side of the ice B. Near the goal crease C. In front of the net D. Inside the goal crease

samples.output: <think>The end screen background transitions from grey to white while the central 'SN UNITED BY SPORT' logo featuring red and blue accents and bottom text reading 'MORE CLIPS' and 'SUBSCRIBE' remain static in their positions on the display throughout the final seconds.</think><answer></answer>

[10-12] The camera tracks player number '46' to reveal his face as he skates, then cuts to a bald man in a dark suit and blue tie sitting behind the glass with spectators in red jerseys visible behind him. [12-14] The bald man shifts his gaze upward as the scoreboard overlay displays '1ST 10:18' and the score for the team on the left updates from '2' to '3'.

The score remains 2-0.

[2-4] The game clock ticks down to 10:21 in the first period. A player in a black jersey with number 73 skates toward the right side of the rink. [4-6] The game clock decreases to 10:19. Near the left goal, the goalie drops to the ice as players in black and white jerseys scramble within the crease. A referee in a striped shirt stands near the left boards observing the play, while a player in black number 73 skates further right.

[14-16] The view cuts from the coach to a close-up of a smiling player on the bench wearing a white helmet and white jersey with black shoulders. [16-18] A player in a white jersey with black shoulders and a white helmet bends forward while surrounded by teammates. Behind him, another player wearing a white jersey with a letter A on the chest is visible. The blue scoreboard ticker at the bottom continues to display goal scorer names.

[18-20] A player in a white jersey with black shoulders and a white helmet numbered 46 raises his head from a downward position to face forward. The camera zooms in on his face while the blue ticker at the bottom of the screen scrolls to display the text "BRAYDEN SCHENN (19)" next to existing goal information.

   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

compressed_segments.text: [6-8] A referee in a black and white striped shirt raises both arms to signal a goal, pointing toward center ice as spectators in the foreground raise their arms and a player in a white jersey skates away from the net while the goaltender remains on the ice. [8-10] The camera zooms in on the back of a player wearing a white jersey with black shoulders displaying the name 'ZEGRAS' and number '46', while an orange graphic labeled 'GOAL' appears on the left side of the bottom scoreboard overlay. [10-12] The camera tracks player number '46' to reveal his face as he skates, then cuts to a bald man in a dark suit and blue tie sitting behind the glass with spectators in red jerseys visible behind him. [12-14] The bald man shifts his gaze upward as the scoreboard overlay displays '1ST 10:18' and the score for the team on the left updates from '2' to '3'.

[14-16] The view cuts from the coach to a smiling player on the bench wearing a white helmet and white jersey with black shoulders. The lower scoreboard ticker changes to a blue bar displaying: "GOALS: PAVEL BUCHNEVICH (22) | ROBERT THOMAS (14)".
[16-18] The player in the white jersey with black shoulders bends forward surrounded by teammates. Behind him, another player wearing a white jersey with a letter A on the chest is visible. The blue scoreboard ticker continues to display goal scorer names.
[18-20] The player in the white jersey with black shoulders and white helmet numbered 46 raises his head from a downward position. The camera zooms in on his face while the blue ticker scrolls to display "BRAYDEN SCHENN (19)".
[20-22] The camera focuses on the player wearing a white helmet with the number 46 and "UCI Health" text on the side. He looks downward while wearing a white jersey with black shoulders. The blue ticker displays "BRAYDEN SCHENN (19)" as it scrolls.

[22-24] A goaltender in a green jersey with "VEJMELEK" on the back and a colorful helmet stands before "MOUNTAIN AMERICA" boards, raising a black glove with orange trim toward his mask. [24-26] The view switches to a player in a white jersey with black shoulders and "ZEGRAS" on the back, wearing a white "UCI Health" helmet and raising a black glove, as the bottom ticker updates to "GOALS: ZACH HYMAN (23 & 24) | EVANDER KANE (16)". [26-28] A wide high-angle shot reveals the ice rink with a goal net in the foreground; a player in a dark jersey #70 stands near the crease while a teammate in dark jersey #42 skates left. [28-30] The camera zooms in as player #70 drops to the ice, while a player in a white jersey skates in from the left with the puck and another battles for position near the crease against a defender.

recent_thinks: [0-2] The game clock decreases from 10:24 to 10:23 in the first period. A red lower-third graphic appears displaying "GOALS: LUCAS RAYMOND (21 & 22)". The score remains 2-0.

[2-4] The game clock ticks down to 10:21 in the first period. A player in a black jersey with number 73 skates toward the right side of the rink. Near the goal on the left, players in black and white jerseys converge around the crease as the goalie defends. The red graphic displaying "GOALS: LUCAS RAYMOND" remains fixed at the bottom.

[4-6] The game clock decreases to 10:19. Near the left goal, the goalie drops to the ice as players in black and white jerseys scramble within the crease. A referee in a striped shirt stands near the left boards observing the play, while a player in black number 73 skates further right.

[30-32] A player in a dark jersey with number 86 skates toward the goal from the left side while the goaltender in dark gear guards the crease. Another player in a white jersey appears on the right side near the boards as the play concentrates around the net mouth.

[32-34] A player in a white jersey with number 46 skates away from the goal net while raising his stick in the air. The goaltender lies on the ice inside the crease, and a referee in a striped shirt stands nearby on the right side as other players in dark jerseys watch.

input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).
